title: Fleet Self-Healing via GL(9) Fault Detection + Critical-Angle Router
question: When GL(9) detects a faulty expert, can the router automatically quarantine it and re-route?
conclusion: YES — GL(9) intent-drift + answer-consensus fault detection triggers automatic re-routing. Phase A: 100% precision, 71% recall, 0.08ms latency. Phase B: Best strategy is 'quarantine' (86.78% accuracy, degradation=+0.0234). Phase C: 4/4 cascade scenarios handled without collapse.

phase_a.description: Self-healing loop: 50 rounds, quarantine strategy, intent+consensus detection

phase_b.description: Strategy comparison: no_action vs quarantine vs cross_consult

phase_c.description: Cascading failure resilience: 2-3 simultaneous faults with quarantine/cross-consult
